title: Armadillo Boxes
description: Adds lesser-good versions of Shulker boxes
body:
This mod adds a new Shulker-like block for the people who dont want to go to the end for some better storage, this Armadillo Box is made with two of its Scutes and a Chest. Adding to Armadillos uses and aiding players early-mid game

This mod will also add Turtle Boxes which also will be a worse Shulker

When Turtle Boxes are added i will make them even worse, they are not a full block and will only be able to insert and extract items from the side which reaches the full block outline. This is currently implemented for the Armadillo Box, shich is alsy why it as a facing property
